adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `DeveloperMode` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Windows Developer Mode.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether Developer Mode should be enabled (`Present`) or disabled (`Absent`).
        Defaults to `Present`.

IsEnabled.title: IsEnabled
IsEnabled.description:
A read-only property indicating whether Developer Mode is currently enabled.
        This property is not configurable.

embedded.description: The `DeveloperMode` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Windows Developer Mode.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/DeveloperMode

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `OsVersion` DSC resource is used to assert a minimum Windows operating system version requirement.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

MinVersion.title: MinVersion
MinVersion.description: The minimum required version of the operating system. This is a mandatory property.

OsVersion.title: OsVersion
OsVersion.description:
A read-only property indicating the current operating system version.
        This property is not configurable.

embedded.description: The `OsVersion` DSC resource is used to assert a minimum Windows operating system version requirement.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/OsVersion

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `Taskbar` DSC resource is used to manage Windows taskbar settings.

Alignment.title: Alignment
Alignment.description:
Sets the taskbar alignment. Accepted values are `Left` or `Middle`.
        Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

HideLabelsMode.title: HideLabelsMode
HideLabelsMode.description:
Sets the taskbar button label hide behavior. Accepted values are `Always`, `WhenFull`, or `Never`.
        Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

SearchboxMode.title: SearchboxMode
SearchboxMode.description:
Sets the search box display mode. Accepted values are `Hide`, `ShowIconOnly`, `SearchBox`, or `ShowIconAndLabel`.
        Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

TaskViewButton.title: TaskViewButton
TaskViewButton.description:
Shows or hides the Task View button on the taskbar.
        Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

WidgetsButton.title: WidgetsButton
WidgetsButton.description:
Shows or hides the Widgets button on the taskbar.
        Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

RestartExplorer.title: RestartExplorer
RestartExplorer.description: Specifies whether to restart Windows Explorer to apply changes. Defaults to `$false`.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

embedded.description: The `Taskbar` DSC resource is used to manage Windows taskbar settings.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/Taskbar

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `WindowsExplorer` DSC resource is used to manage Windows Explorer settings.

FileExtensions.title: FileExtensions
FileExtensions.description: Shows or hides file extensions in File Explorer. Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

HiddenFiles.title: HiddenFiles
HiddenFiles.description: Shows or hides hidden files and folders in File Explorer. Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

ItemCheckBoxes.title: ItemCheckBoxes
ItemCheckBoxes.description: Shows or hides item checkboxes in File Explorer. Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

RestartExplorer.title: RestartExplorer
RestartExplorer.description: Specifies whether to restart Windows Explorer to apply changes. Defaults to `$false`.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

embedded.description: The `WindowsExplorer` DSC resource is used to manage Windows Explorer settings.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/WindowsExplorer

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `UserAccessControl` DSC resource is used to manage the User Account Control (UAC) prompt behavior.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

AdminConsentPromptBehavior.title: AdminConsentPromptBehavior
AdminConsentPromptBehavior.description:
Specifies the UAC admin consent prompt behavior. Accepted values are `NoCredOrConsentRequired`,
        `RequireCredOnSecureDesktop`, `RequireConsentOnSecureDesktop`, `RequireCred`,
        `RequireConsent`, or `RequireConsentForNonWindowsBinaries`. Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

embedded.description: The `UserAccessControl` DSC resource is used to manage the User Account Control (UAC) prompt behavior.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/UserAccessControl

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `EnableDarkMode` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Windows dark mode.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether dark mode should be enabled (`Present`) or disabled (`Absent`).
        Defaults to `Present`.

RestartExplorer.title: RestartExplorer
RestartExplorer.description: Specifies whether to restart Windows Explorer to apply changes. Defaults to `$false`.

embedded.description: The `EnableDarkMode` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Windows dark mode.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/EnableDarkMode

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `ShowSecondsInClock` DSC resource is used to show or hide seconds in the taskbar clock.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether seconds should be shown (`Present`) or hidden (`Absent`) in the clock.
        Defaults to `Present`.

embedded.description: The `ShowSecondsInClock` DSC resource is used to show or hide seconds in the taskbar clock.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/ShowSecondsInClock

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `EnableRemoteDesktop` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Remote Desktop connections.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether Remote Desktop should be enabled (`Present`) or disabled (`Absent`).
        Defaults to `Present`.

embedded.description: The `EnableRemoteDesktop` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Remote Desktop connections.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/EnableRemoteDesktop

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `EnableLongPathSupport` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Windows long path support.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether long path support should be enabled (`Present`) or disabled (`Absent`).
        Defaults to `Present`.

embedded.description: The `EnableLongPathSupport` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Windows long path support.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/EnableLongPathSupport

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `PowerPlanSetting` DSC resource is used to manage Windows power plan settings.

Name.title: Name
Name.description:
The name of the power plan setting to configure. Accepted values are `DisplayTimeout`
        or `SleepTimeout`. This is a key and mandatory property.

PowerSource.title: PowerSource
PowerSource.description:
The power source for the setting. Accepted values are `PluggedIn`, `Battery`, or `All`.
        This is a mandatory property.

SettingValue.title: SettingValue
SettingValue.description: The timeout value in seconds. This is a mandatory property.

PluggedInValue.title: PluggedInValue
PluggedInValue.description: A read-only property indicating the current plugged-in timeout value. This property is not configurable.

BatteryValue.title: BatteryValue
BatteryValue.description: A read-only property indicating the current battery timeout value. This property is not configurable.

embedded.description: The `PowerPlanSetting` DSC resource is used to manage Windows power plan settings.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/PowerPlanSetting

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `WindowsCapability` DSC resource is used to install or remove Windows optional features.

Name.title: Name
Name.description: The name of the Windows capability to manage. This is a key and mandatory property.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether the capability should be installed (`Present`) or removed (`Absent`).
        Defaults to `Present`.

embedded.description: The `WindowsCapability` DSC resource is used to install or remove Windows optional features.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/WindowsCapability

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `NetConnectionProfile` DSC resource is used to manage the network connection profile for a network adapter.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

InterfaceAlias.title: InterfaceAlias
InterfaceAlias.description: The alias of the network interface to configure. This is a mandatory property.

NetworkCategory.title: NetworkCategory
NetworkCategory.description:
The network category to assign. Accepted values are `Public`, `Private`, or `DomainAuthenticated`.
        This is a mandatory property.

embedded.description: The `NetConnectionProfile` DSC resource is used to manage the network connection profile for a network adapter.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/NetConnectionProfile

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `AdvancedNetworkSharingSetting` DSC resource is used to manage Windows advanced network sharing settings.

Name.title: Name
Name.description:
The advanced sharing setting to configure. Accepted values are `NetworkDiscovery`
        or `FileAndPrinterSharing`. This is a key and mandatory property.

Profiles.title: Profiles
Profiles.description: The network profiles for which the setting should be enabled (e.g., `Domain`, `Private`, `Public`).

EnabledProfiles.title: EnabledProfiles
EnabledProfiles.description:
A read-only property listing the profiles for which the setting is currently enabled.
        This property is not configurable.

embedded.description: The `AdvancedNetworkSharingSetting` DSC resource is used to manage Windows advanced network sharing settings.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/AdvancedNetworkSharingSetting

adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `FirewallRule` DSC resource is used to create, modify, or remove Windows Firewall rules.

Name.title: Name
Name.description: The unique name of the firewall rule. This is a key and mandatory property.

DisplayName.title: DisplayName
DisplayName.description: The display name of the firewall rule.

Action.title: Action
Action.description: The action for the firewall rule. Accepted values are `NotConfigured`, `Allow`, or `Block`.

Description.title: Description
Description.description: A description for the firewall rule.

Direction.title: Direction
Direction.description: The direction of the firewall rule. Accepted values are `Inbound` or `Outbound`.

Enabled.title: Enabled
Enabled.description: Specifies whether the firewall rule is enabled.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description: Specifies whether the firewall rule should be present or absent. Defaults to `Present`.

LocalPort.title: LocalPort
LocalPort.description: The local ports to which the rule applies.

Profiles.title: Profiles
Profiles.description: The network profiles to which the rule applies (e.g., `Domain`, `Private`, `Public`).

Protocol.title: Protocol
Protocol.description: The protocol for the firewall rule (e.g., `TCP`, `UDP`).

embedded.description: The `FirewallRule` DSC resource is used to create, modify, or remove Windows Firewall rules.
embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/FirewallRule
